channel.title: Security on Steven Leung
channel.description: Recent content in Security on Steven Leung

item.title: Agentic AI Security Threats
item.description: An exploration of the security risks posed by agentic AI systems -- published on the Duo Security blog.

item.title: Device Quarantine: 0-to-1 ML Security Feature
item.description: Led an ML-powered security feature from ideation through production -- building novel data labeling and high-precision adversarial detection.
